segments.text: Keep me safe, my God, for in you I take refuge.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You are my Lord; apart from you I have no good thing.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I say of the holy people who are in the land,
They are the noble ones in whom is all my delight.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Those who run after other gods will suffer more and more.
I will not pour out libations of blood to such gods or take up their names on my lips.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Lord, you alone are my portion and my cup; you make my lot secure.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The boundary lines have fallen for me in pleasant places; surely I have a delightful inheritance.
I will praise the Lord, who counsels me; even at night my heart instructs me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I keep my eyes always on the Lord. With him at my right hand, I will not be shaken.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Therefore my heart is glad and my tongue rejoices; my body also will rest secure,
because you will not abandon me to the realm of the dead, nor will you let your faithful one see decay.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You make known to me the path of life; you will fill me with joy in your presence, with eternal pleasures at your right hand.
segments.speaker: David
